cmd: echo === SENTINELS === & if exist C:\RacingPoint\MAINTENANCE_MODE (echo MAINTENANCE_MODE_EXISTS) else (echo NO_MAINTENANCE) & if exist C:\RacingPoint\OTA_DEPLOYING (echo OTA_EXISTS) else (echo NO_OTA) & if exist C:\RacingPoint\DEPLOY_IN_PROGRESS (echo DEPLOY_EXISTS) else (echo NO_DEPLOY) & echo === AGENT_PROCESS === & tasklist /FI "IMAGENAME eq rc-agent.exe" 2>nul & echo === WATCHDOG_SERVICE === & sc query RCWatchdog 2>nul | findstr STATE & echo === SESSION_CHECK === & query session 2>nul || echo NO_SESSION_QUERY & echo === LOGON_USERS === & wmic computersystem get username 2>nul
